source: PokéAPI REST summarized for offline runtime use

abilities.name: Synchronize
abilities.effect: Copies burns, paralysis, and poison received onto the Pokémon that inflicted them.
abilities.flavor_text: If the Pokémon is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned by another Pokémon, that Pokémon will be inflicted with the same status condition.

abilities.name: Early Bird
abilities.effect: Makes sleep pass twice as quickly.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon awakens from sleep twice as fast as other Pokémon.

abilities.name: Magic Bounce
abilities.effect: Reflects most non-damaging moves back at their user.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon reflects status moves instead of getting hit by them.

abilities.name: Fairy Aura
abilities.effect: Strengthens Fairy moves to 1.33× their power for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up each Pokémon’s Fairy-type moves.

abilities.name: Beast Boost
abilities.effect: Raises this Pokémon's highest stat by one stage when it faints another Pokémon.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon boosts its most proficient stat each time it knocks out a Pokémon.
